message:
style: run rustfmt on data structure modules, proptest suites, and search imports

Apply cargo fmt to 35 files containing only formatting changes: struct
field layouts, method chain wrapping, multi-line assert! macro expansion,
import ordering, and whitespace normalization across data structure
modules (adaptive_radix_tree, count_min_sketch, crdt, cuckoo_filter,
disjoint_intervals, entropy_accounting, fenwick_tree, fibonacci_heap,
hyperloglog, kd_tree, pane_typestate, r_tree, rope, segment_tree,
sparse_table, suffix_array, treap, trie, union_find, van_emde_boas,
wavelet_tree, work_stealing_deque, xor_filter), search modules
(chunk_vector_store, chunking, hash_embedder), lib.rs module ordering,
and proptest suites (chaos, docs_gen, kd_tree, merkle_tree,
self_stabilize, simulation, storage_expanded, work_stealing_deque).

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -535,9 +535,16 @@ impl TransitionLog {
 pub fn is_valid_transition(from: StateLabel, to: StateLabel) -> bool {
     matches!(
         (from, to),
-        (StateLabel::Creating | StateLabel::Snapshotting, StateLabel::Active)
-            | (StateLabel::Active, StateLabel::Snapshotting | StateLabel::Closed)
-            | (StateLabel::Restoring, StateLabel::Active | StateLabel::Closed)
+        (
+            StateLabel::Creating | StateLabel::Snapshotting,
+            StateLabel::Active
+        ) | (
+            StateLabel::Active,
+            StateLabel::Snapshotting | StateLabel::Closed
+        ) | (
+            StateLabel::Restoring,
+            StateLabel::Active | StateLabel::Closed
+        )
     )
 }
